apps.name: Pitching Analysis Dashboard
apps.description: Softball pitching video analysis with MediaPipe pose estimation

apps.name: CPO Finder
apps.description: Certified pre-owned inventory tracker (Lexus/Genesis/Infiniti/Acura/Mazda/Toyota/VW) with daily scrape + cost-of-ownership and warranty tools

services.name: cpo-finder-web
services.label: Web Dashboard
services.description: Flask/gunicorn server on port 3003 serving inventory dashboard + calculators

services.name: cpo-finder-scrape
services.label: Daily Scrape
services.description: Runs scraper_main.py, commits refreshed JSON, pushes to main (6:00 AM ET)

apps.name: Scrooge Trading Bot
apps.description: Automated MES/MNQ futures + 0DTE options trading bot (ORB strategy) with TradeStation real-time feed and Next.js status dashboard

services.name: scrooge-signal-loop
services.label: Signal Loop
services.description: Main trading daemon — processes signals, places orders (includes inline options executor)

services.name: scrooge-live-pnl
services.label: Live P&L
services.description: Real-time futures P&L tracking and Telegram updates

services.name: scrooge-shadow-trader
services.label: Shadow Trader
services.description: Mirrors production signals to live personal futures account (210VVC62)

services.name: scrooge-options-pnl
services.label: Options P&L
services.description: Monitors options trade log and updates pinned Telegram message with live options P&L

services.name: scrooge-briefing
services.label: Briefing
services.description: Morning market briefing + regime analysis (9:15 AM ET)

services.name: scrooge-orb-confirm
services.label: ORB Confirm
services.description: Calculate and set breakout levels for the day (10:01 AM ET)

services.name: scrooge-orb-health
services.label: ORB Health
services.description: Validate ORB levels exist, self-heal if missing (10:05 AM ET)

services.name: scrooge-selfheal
services.label: Self-Heal
services.description: Recover missed briefing/ORB operations (10:15 AM ET)

services.name: scrooge-close
services.label: Close Warning
services.description: Market close position check and warnings (3:30 PM ET)

services.name: scrooge-eod
services.label: EOD Report
services.description: End-of-day reconciliation, P&L report, dashboard screenshot (4:00 PM ET)

services.name: scrooge-watchdog
services.label: Watchdog
services.description: Signal loop health monitor — auto-restarts if unhealthy (every 5 min market hours)

services.name: scrooge-eod-reconciler
services.label: EOD Reconciler
services.description: Post-EOD broker sync with retries (4:01, 4:15, 4:30, 4:45 PM ET)

services.name: scrooge-premarket-cleanup
services.label: Pre-Market Cleanup
services.description: Delete yesterday's pinned P&L messages (9:15 AM ET)

services.name: scrooge-options-pnl-update
services.label: Options P&L Update
services.description: Update options P&L Telegram pin (every 15 min 9-15 ET)

services.name: scrooge-clearlevels-eod
services.label: Clear Levels EOD
services.description: Clear Levels EOD performance update (4:15 PM ET)
